series_metadata.series_description: Information pertaining to audit of continuing education, which may include; correspondence, certified mail receipts, licensee''s log of continuing education, supporting documentation, etc.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: If case file is created for non-compliance, then place with enforcement file. If compliant with continuing education requirements, then retain for 2 years following the end of the biennium in which the licensee is in compliance with audit requirements.. ; Electronic: Retain for 2 years following the end of the biennium in which the licensee is in compliance with audit requirements., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
